spec.name: zlib_compress
spec.description: Read a file, compress its bytes with zlib, and write the lowercase hex of the compressed bytes to an output file

input_path.description: Path to the input file to read

output_path.description: Path to write the hex-encoded compressed output

spec.implementation_notes: Use Node.js (node) to read the input file as a Buffer, zlib.deflateSync it, then write the hex string to the output file. Node.js is likely available since this is a development environment. Command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const zlib=require('zlib');const input=fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1]);const compressed=zlib.deflateSync(input);fs.writeFileSync(process.argv[2],compressed.toString('hex'));" INPUT OUTPUT

request.rationale: Need zlib compression but Python is unavailable (exit 9009). Node.js is likely installed in this dev environment and can perform zlib compression natively.
